string-array.name: jokes
string-array.item: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
What do you call cheese that isn’t yours? Nacho cheese!
Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts!

string-array.name: facts
string-array.item: Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found 3,000-year-old honey still edible!
Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.
Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
